     1 | 'use client';
     2 | 
     3 | import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, memo, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
     4 | 
     5 | import {
     6 |   ReactFlow,
     7 |   MiniMap,
     8 |   Controls,
     9 |   Background,
    10 |   BackgroundVariant,
    11 |   Panel,
    12 |   MarkerType,
    13 |   ConnectionLineType,
    14 |   useReactFlow,
    15 |   ReactFlowProvider,
    16 | } from '@xyflow/react';
    17 | import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css';
    18 | import InfrastructureNode from '../Nodes/InfrastructureNode';
    19 | import NetworkEdge from './EdgeRenderer';
    20 | import ConnectionPreview from './ConnectionPreview';
    21 | import { useNodeStateStore, type InfrastructureNode as INode } from '../../modules/nodeState';
    22 | import type { InfrastructureNodeType, InfrastructureNodeData } from '../Nodes/InfrastructureNode';
    23 | import { calculateNodeRiskCategory } from '../../utils/calculateNodeRisk';
    24 | 
    25 | const nodeTypes = {
    26 |   infrastructure: InfrastructureNode,
    27 | } as any;
    28 | 
    29 | const edgeTypes = {
    30 |   network: NetworkEdge,
    31 | } as any;
    32 | 
    33 | let nodeCounter = 100;
    34 | 
    35 | /* ── Suggestion engine for unconnected nodes ── */
    36 | const SUGGESTED_CONNECTIONS: Record<string, string[]> = {
    37 |   'WebServer': ['AppServer', 'Firewall'],
    38 |   'AppServer': ['Database', 'Storage', 'CloudInstance'],
    39 |   'Database': ['Storage'],
    40 |   'Firewall': ['WebServer', 'AppServer'],
    41 |   'CloudInstance': ['Database', 'Storage'],
    42 |   'Workstation': ['AppServer', 'WebServer'],
    43 |   'Storage': [],
    44 | };
    45 | 
    46 | interface ConnectionSuggestion {
    47 |   sourceId: string;
    48 |   targetId: string;
    49 |   sourceLabel: string;
    50 |   targetLabel: string;
    51 | }
    52 | 
    53 | const Flow: React.FC = memo(() => {
    54 |   const {
    55 |     nodes,
    56 |     edges,
    57 |     onNodesChange,
    58 |     onEdgesChange,
    59 |     onConnect,
    60 |     selectedNodeId,
    61 |     setSelectedNodeId,
    62 |     addNode,
    63 |     isSimulating,
    64 |     simulationError,
    65 |     pendingConnectionNodeId,
    66 |     setPendingConnection,
    67 |     addEdgeBetween,
    68 |     backendResult,
    69 |     autoArrange,
    70 |     focusModeEnabled,
    71 |     focusedAttackPath,
    72 |     attackTimelineStep,
    73 |     heatmapEnabled,
    74 |     attackPath,
    75 |     attackPlaybackStep,
    76 |     isPlaying,
    77 |     simulationJustFinished,
    78 |     startPlayback,
    79 |     clearSimulationJustFinished,
    80 |     reportTab,
    81 |     viewMode,
    82 |   } = useNodeStateStore();
    83 | 
    84 |   // Auto-play once when simulation finishes
    85 |   useEffect(() => {
    86 |     if (simulationJustFinished && attackPath.length > 0) {
    87 |       clearSimulationJustFinished();
    88 |       // Small delay to let the UI settle
    89 |       const t = setTimeout(() => {
    90 |         startPlayback();
    91 |       }, 800);
    92 |       return () => clearTimeout(t);
    93 |     }
    94 |   }, [simulationJustFinished, attackPath.length, clearSimulationJustFinished, startPlayback]);
    95 | 
    96 |   const riskStats = useMemo(() => {
    97 |     let high = 0;
    98 |     let critical = 0;
    99 |     if (heatmapEnabled) {
   100 |       nodes.forEach(n => {
   101 |         const risk = calculateNodeRiskCategory(n.data as any);
   102 |         if (risk === 'HIGH') high++;
   103 |         if (risk === 'CRITICAL') critical++;
   104 |       });
   105 |     }
   106 |     return { high, critical };
   107 |   }, [nodes, heatmapEnabled]);
   108 | 
   109 |   const reactFlowWrapper = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   110 |   const { screenToFlowPosition } = useReactFlow();
   111 | 
   112 |   /* ── Mouse position for click-to-connect preview line ── */
   113 |   const [mousePos, setMousePos] = useState<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
   114 | 
   115 |   /* ── Connection Suggestions ── */
   116 |   const suggestions = useMemo<ConnectionSuggestion[]>(() => {
   117 |     if (nodes.length < 2 || edges.length > 0) return [];
   118 |     const result: ConnectionSuggestion[] = [];
   119 |     for (const node of nodes) {
   120 |       const nodeType = node.data.type as string;
   121 |       const targets = SUGGESTED_CONNECTIONS[nodeType] || [];
   122 |       for (const targetType of targets) {
   123 |         const targetNode = nodes.find(n => n.data.type === targetType && n.id !== node.id);
   124 |         if (targetNode) {
   125 |           const alreadySuggested = result.some(
   126 |             s => (s.sourceId === node.id && s.targetId === targetNode.id) ||
   127 |               (s.sourceId === targetNode.id && s.targetId === node.id)
   128 |           );
   129 |           if (!alreadySuggested) {
   130 |             result.push({
   131 |               sourceId: node.id,
   132 |               targetId: targetNode.id,
   133 |               sourceLabel: node.data.label,
   134 |               targetLabel: targetNode.data.label,
   135 |             });
   136 |           }
   137 |         }
   138 |       }
   139 |     }
   140 |     return result.slice(0, 5);
   141 |   }, [nodes, edges]);
   142 | 
   143 |   /* ── Click-to-connect: node click handler ── */
   144 |   const onNodeClick = useCallback((_: React.MouseEvent, node: any) => {
   145 |     if (pendingConnectionNodeId) {
   146 |       if (pendingConnectionNodeId === node.id) {
   147 |         // Cancel: clicked same node
   148 |         setPendingConnection(null);
   149 |       } else {
   150 |         // Create edge
   151 |         addEdgeBetween(pendingConnectionNodeId, node.id);
   152 |         setPendingConnection(null);
   153 |       }
   154 |     } else {
   155 |       // Start connection mode OR just select
   156 |       setPendingConnection(node.id);
   157 |       setSelectedNodeId(node.id);
   158 |     }
   159 |   }, [pendingConnectionNodeId, setPendingConnection, addEdgeBetween, setSelectedNodeId]);
   160 | 
   161 |   const onPaneClick = useCallback(() => {
   162 |     setPendingConnection(null);
   163 |     setSelectedNodeId(null);
   164 |   }, [setPendingConnection, setSelectedNodeId]);
   165 | 
   166 |   /* ── ESC key to cancel connection ── */
   167 |   useEffect(() => {
   168 |     const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   169 |       if (e.key === 'Escape' && pendingConnectionNodeId) {
   170 |         setPendingConnection(null);
   171 |       }
   172 |     };
   173 |     window.addEventListener('keydown', handler);
   174 |     return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handler);
   175 |   }, [pendingConnectionNodeId, setPendingConnection]);
   176 | 
   177 |   /* ── Keyboard Shortcuts ── */
   178 |   useEffect(() => {
   179 |     const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   180 |       if (document.activeElement?.tagName === 'INPUT' || document.activeElement?.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return;
   181 | 
   182 |       if (e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') {
   183 |         autoArrange();
   184 |       } else if ((e.key === 'c' || e.key === 'C') && selectedNodeId) {
   185 |         setPendingConnection(selectedNodeId);
   186 |       }
   187 |     };
   188 |     window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
   189 |     return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
   190 |   }, [autoArrange, selectedNodeId, setPendingConnection]);
   191 | 
   192 |   /* ── Track mouse for preview line ── */
   193 |   const onMouseMove = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
   194 |     if (pendingConnectionNodeId && reactFlowWrapper.current) {
   195 |       const rect = reactFlowWrapper.current.getBoundingClientRect();
   196 |       setMousePos({ x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top });
   197 |     }
   198 |   }, [pendingConnectionNodeId]);
   199 | 
   200 |   useEffect(() => {
   201 |     if (!pendingConnectionNodeId) setMousePos(null);
   202 |   }, [pendingConnectionNodeId]);
   203 | 
   204 |   /* ── Source node center position for preview line ── */
   205 |   const sourceNodeCenter = useMemo(() => {
   206 |     if (!pendingConnectionNodeId) return null;
   207 |     const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === pendingConnectionNodeId);
   208 |     if (!node) return null;
   209 |     return { x: node.position.x + 95, y: node.position.y + 50 };
   210 |   }, [pendingConnectionNodeId, nodes]);
   211 | 
   212 |   /* ── Drag and drop ── */
   213 |   const onDragOver = useCallback((event: React.DragEvent) => {
   214 |     event.preventDefault();
   215 |     event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
   216 |   }, []);
   217 | 
   218 |   const onDrop = useCallback((event: React.DragEvent) => {
   219 |     event.preventDefault();
   220 | 
   221 |     const type = event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-type') as InfrastructureNodeType;
   222 |     if (!type) return;
   223 | 
   224 |     const label = event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-label') || type;
   225 |     const ports = JSON.parse(event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-ports') || '[]');
   226 |     const privilege = event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-privilege') || 'Low';
   227 |     const criticality = event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-criticality') || 'Low';
   228 |     const assetValue = parseInt(event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow-assetvalue') || '3', 10);
   229 | 
   230 |     const position = screenToFlowPosition({
   231 |       x: event.clientX,
   232 |       y: event.clientY,
   233 |     });
   234 | 
   235 |     nodeCounter++;
   236 |     const newNode: INode = {
   237 |       id: `node-${nodeCounter}`,
   238 |       type: 'infrastructure',
   239 |       position,
   240 |       data: {
   241 |         label: label.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_'),
   242 |         type,
   243 |         ports,
   244 |         vulnerabilities: 0,
   245 |         status: 'online',
   246 |         publicExposure: false,
   247 |         privilegeLevel: privilege as 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High',
   248 |         vulnerabilitiesList: [],
   249 |         dataCriticality: criticality as 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High',
   250 |         assetValue,
   251 |       },
   252 |     };
   253 | 
   254 |     addNode(newNode);
   255 |   }, [screenToFlowPosition, addNode]);
   256 | 
   257 |   const defaultEdgeOptions = useMemo(() => ({
   258 |     style: { stroke: '#D1D5DB', strokeWidth: 1.5, transition: 'all 0.3s ease' },
   259 |     markerEnd: { type: MarkerType.ArrowClosed, color: '#D1D5DB' },
   260 |   }), []);
   261 | 
   262 |   const connectionLineStyle = useMemo(() => ({
   263 |     stroke: '#D1D5DB',
   264 |     strokeWidth: 1.5,
   265 |     strokeDasharray: '6 3',
   266 |     transition: 'all 0.3s ease'
   267 |   }), []);
   268 | 
   269 |   const renderedNodes = useMemo(() => {
   270 |     if (!focusModeEnabled || !focusedAttackPath) return nodes;
   271 | 
   272 |     return nodes.map((node) => {
   273 |       const isPathNode = focusedAttackPath.includes(node.id);
   274 | 
   275 |       let opacity = 0.3;
   276 |       if (isPathNode) {
   277 |         if (attackTimelineStep === null) {
   278 |           opacity = 1;
   279 |         } else {
   280 |           const pathIndex = focusedAttackPath.indexOf(node.id);
   281 |           opacity = pathIndex <= attackTimelineStep ? 1 : 0.3;
   282 |         }
   283 |       }
   284 | 
   285 |       return {
   286 |         ...node,
   287 |         style: {
   288 |           ...node.style,
   289 |           opacity,
   290 |           transition: 'opacity 0.3s ease',
   291 |         },
   292 |       };
   293 |     });
   294 |   }, [nodes, focusModeEnabled, focusedAttackPath, attackTimelineStep]);
   295 | 
   296 |   const renderedEdges = useMemo(() => {
   297 |     return edges.map((edge) => {
   298 |       let label: string | undefined = undefined;
   299 | 
   300 |       if (backendResult?.attack_timeline) {
   301 |         const tlStep = backendResult.attack_timeline.find((t: any) => t.node === edge.target);
   302 |         if (tlStep && tlStep.success_probability !== undefined) {
   303 |           label = `${Math.round(tlStep.success_probability * 100)}%`;
   304 |         }
   305 |       } else if (backendResult?.attack_steps) {
   306 |         const step = backendResult.attack_steps.find((s: any) => s.node === edge.target);
   307 |         if (step && (step as any).success_probability) {
   308 |           label = `${Math.round((step as any).success_probability * 100)}%`;
   309 |         }
   310 |       }
   311 | 
   312 |       // Playback-aware edge rendering
   313 |       if (attackPlaybackStep >= 0 && attackPath.length > 0) {
   314 |         const sourcePathIdx = attackPath.indexOf(edge.source);
   315 |         const targetPathIdx = attackPath.indexOf(edge.target);
   316 |         const isPlaybackEdge = sourcePathIdx !== -1 && targetPathIdx !== -1 && targetPathIdx === sourcePathIdx + 1;
   317 |         const isReachedEdge = isPlaybackEdge && targetPathIdx <= attackPlaybackStep;
   318 |         const isCurrentEdge = isPlaybackEdge && targetPathIdx === attackPlaybackStep;
   319 | 
   320 |         return {
   321 |           ...edge,
   322 |           label,
   323 |           labelBgStyle: { fill: '#fff', fillOpacity: 0.9, color: '#111' },
   324 |           labelStyle: { fill: '#111', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 10 },
   325 |           data: {
   326 |             ...edge.data,
   327 |             playbackActive: isCurrentEdge,
   328 |           },
   329 |           style: {
   330 |             ...edge.style,
   331 |             stroke: isReachedEdge ? '#DC2626' : '#D1D5DB',
   332 |             strokeWidth: isReachedEdge ? 3 : 1.5,
   333 |             opacity: isPlaybackEdge ? (isReachedEdge ? 1 : 0.3) : 0.2,
   334 |             filter: isCurrentEdge ? 'drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(220,38,38,0.5))' : undefined,
   335 |             transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
   336 |           },
   337 |         };
   338 |       }
   339 | 
   340 |       if (!focusModeEnabled || !focusedAttackPath) {
   341 |         return {
   342 |           ...edge,
   343 |           label,
   344 |           labelBgStyle: { fill: '#fff', fillOpacity: 0.9, color: '#111' },
   345 |           labelStyle: { fill: '#111', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 10 }
   346 |         };
   347 |       }
   348 | 
   349 |       const sourceIdx = focusedAttackPath.indexOf(edge.source);
   350 |       const targetIdx = focusedAttackPath.indexOf(edge.target);
   351 |       const isPathEdge = sourceIdx !== -1 && targetIdx !== -1 && targetIdx === sourceIdx + 1;
   352 | 
   353 |       let opacity = 0.2;
   354 |       let strokeWidth = 1.5;
   355 |       let stroke = '#D1D5DB';
   356 | 
   357 |       if (isPathEdge) {
   358 |         if (attackTimelineStep === null) {
   359 |           opacity = 1;
   360 |           strokeWidth = 3;
   361 |           stroke = '#111';
   362 |         } else {
   363 |           opacity = targetIdx <= attackTimelineStep ? 1 : 0.2;
   364 |           strokeWidth = targetIdx <= attackTimelineStep ? 3 : 1.5;
   365 |           stroke = targetIdx <= attackTimelineStep ? '#111' : '#D1D5DB';
   366 |         }
   367 |       }
   368 | 
   369 |       return {
   370 |         ...edge,
   371 |         label,
   372 |         labelBgStyle: { fill: '#fff', fillOpacity: 0.9, color: '#111' },
   373 |         labelStyle: { fill: '#111', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 10 },
   374 |         style: {
   375 |           ...edge.style,
   376 |           stroke,
   377 |           opacity,
   378 |           strokeWidth,
   379 |           transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
   380 |         },
   381 |       };
   382 |     });
   383 |   }, [edges, focusModeEnabled, focusedAttackPath, attackTimelineStep, backendResult, attackPlaybackStep, attackPath]);
   384 | 
   385 |   return (
   386 |     <div
   387 |       ref={reactFlowWrapper}
   388 |       className="w-full h-full bg-white relative overflow-hidden"
   389 |       onMouseMove={onMouseMove}
   390 |     >
   391 |       <ReactFlow
   392 |         nodes={renderedNodes}
   393 |         edges={renderedEdges}
   394 |         onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
   395 |         onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
   396 |         onConnect={onConnect}
   397 |         onNodeClick={onNodeClick}
   398 |         onPaneClick={onPaneClick}
   399 |         onDragOver={onDragOver}
   400 |         onDrop={onDrop}
   401 |         nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
   402 |         edgeTypes={edgeTypes}
   403 |         fitView
   404 |         snapToGrid
   405 |         snapGrid={[24, 24]}
   406 |         colorMode="light"
   407 |         style={{ background: '#FFFFFF' }}
   408 |         defaultEdgeOptions={defaultEdgeOptions}
   409 |         connectionLineStyle={connectionLineStyle}
   410 |         connectionLineType={ConnectionLineType.SmoothStep}
   411 |         connectionLineComponent={ConnectionPreview}
   412 |         minZoom={0.1}
   413 |         maxZoom={2}
   414 |         deleteKeyCode={['Backspace', 'Delete']}
   415 |       >
   416 |         <Background
   417 |           variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots}
   418 |           gap={24}
   419 |           size={1}
   420 |           color="#E0E0E0"
   421 |         />
   422 |         <Controls
   423 |           className="!bg-white !border !border-[#E5E5E5] !rounded-lg overflow-hidden !left-4 !bottom-4 !top-auto !shadow-sm"
   424 |           showInteractive={false}
   425 |           position="bottom-left"
   426 |         />
   427 |         {reportTab !== 'ai' && (
   428 |           <>
   429 |             <MiniMap
   430 |               className="!bg-white !border !border-[#E5E5E5] !right-4 !bottom-4 !rounded-lg overflow-hidden !shadow-sm"
   431 |               maskColor="rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)"
   432 |               nodeColor={(n: any) => {
   433 |                 if (n.data.isEntry) return '#10B981';
   434 |                 if (n.data.isTarget) return '#991B1B';
   435 |                 if (n.data.compromised) return '#DC2626';
   436 |                 if (n.data.highlighted) return '#DC2626';

   439 |               zoomable
   440 |               pannable
   441 |             />
   442 |           </>
   443 |         )}
   444 |

   462 |                   <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] text-[#DC2626] font-medium">
   463 |                     <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#DC2626] animate-pulse" /> Running
   464 |                   </span>

   472 |                     {nodes.length}

   512 |                       </span>
   513 |                     </div>
   514 |                   </div>

   516 |               </div>
   517 |

   523 |             </div>

   526 |

   528 |         {nodes.length === 0 && (

   544 |           className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[5]"

    10 | export default function AttackReportView() {

    12 | 
    13 |     if (viewMode !== 'report') return null;
    14 | 
    15 |     const riskScore = backendResult?.risk_score?.toFixed(1) ?? (simulationResults?.riskScore ? (simulationResults.riskScore / 10).toFixed(1) : '—');
    16 |     const severity = simulationResults?.severity || backendResult?.severity;
    17 |     const isHigh = severity === 'High' || severity === 'Critical';
    18 |     const isAiTab = reportTab === 'ai';
    19 | 
    20 |     return (
    21 |         <div className={`w-full h-full flex flex-col overflow-hidden relative ${isAiTab ? 'bg-transparent pointer-events-none' : 'bg-[#FAFAFA]'}`}>
    22 | 
    23 |             {/* Sticky Info Bar + Tabs */}

    30 |                 }}
    31 |             >
    32 |                 {/* Compact Metrics Bar */}

    79 |                         />

    93 |                     >
    94 |                         {['metrics', 'paths', 'timeline', 'defender', 'ai'].map((tab) => (
    95 |                             <button
    96 |                                 key={tab}

    98 |                                 className={`px-4 py-[5px] text-[12px] font-medium capitalize rounded-md transition-all ${reportTab === tab
    99 |                                     ? 'bg-black text-white shadow-sm'

   119 |                 <div className="flex-1 relative overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
   120 |

   133 |                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">
   134 |                     <div className="w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 pt-6 pb-12 flex flex-col">
   135 |                         {reportTab === 'timeline' ? (
   136 |                             <AttackTimeline />
   137 |                         ) : (
   138 |                             <SimulationResultPanel />
   139 |                         )}
   140 |                     </div>
   141 |                 </div>
   142 |             )}
   143 |         </div>
   144 |     );

   146 | 
   147 | /* ── AI Insight Panel ────────────────────────────── */
   148 | 
   149 | const AIInsightPanel = ({ backendResult, simulationResults, attackPath, severity }: {
   150 |     backendResult: any;
   151 |     simulationResults: any;
   152 |     attackPath: string[];
   153 |     severity?: string;
   154 | }) => {
   155 |     const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
   156 |     const [aiSubTab, setAiSubTab] = useState<'edge' | 'cloud'>('edge');
   157 | 
   158 |     const edgeAi = backendResult?.ai?.edge_ai;
   159 |     const cloudAi = backendResult?.ai?.cloud_ai;
   160 |     const activeData = aiSubTab === 'edge' ? edgeAi : cloudAi;
   161 |     const insightText = activeData?.insight || '';
   162 | 
   163 |     const pathNodes = backendResult?.primary_path || backendResult?.attack_path || [];
   164 |     const breachTime = backendResult?.breach_time_data?.total_minutes ?? parseInt(simulationResults?.estimatedBreachTime || '0', 10);
   165 |     const pathLength = pathNodes.length;
   166 | 
   167 |     const handleCopy = async () => {
   168 |         if (insightText) {
   169 |             await navigator.clipboard.writeText(insightText);
   170 |             setCopied(true);
   171 |             setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
   172 |         }
   173 |     };
   174 | 
   175 |     return (
   176 |         <div
   177 |             className="pointer-events-auto w-full max-w-[680px] max-h-[85vh] flex flex-col rounded-2xl overflow-hidden"
   178 |             style={{
   179 |                 backdropFilter: 'blur(2px)',
   180 |                 WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(2px)',
   181 |                 background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)',
   182 |                 boxShadow: '0 16px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)',
   183 |                 border: '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)',
   184 |             }}
   185 |         >
   186 |             {/* Header */}
   187 |             <div className="px-6 pt-5 pb-3 shrink-0">
   188 |                 {/* AI Badge */}
   189 |                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   190 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   191 |                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-black/[0.06]">
   192 |                             <Sparkles size={11} className="text-[#111]" />
   193 |                             <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-[#111] uppercase tracking-widest">AI Security Insight</span>
   194 |                         </div>
   195 |                         {activeData?.model && (
   196 |                             <span className="text-[10px] text-[#9CA3AF] font-mono">
   197 |                                 Model: {activeData.model}
   198 |                             </span>
   199 |                         )}
   200 |                     </div>
   201 | 
   202 |                     {/* Copy button */}
   203 |                     <button
   204 |                         onClick={handleCopy}
   205 |                         className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-[10px] font-medium text-[#6B7280] hover:bg-black/5 transition-colors"
   206 |                         disabled={!insightText}
   207 |                     >
   208 |                         {copied ? <Check size={11} className="text-emerald-500" /> : <Copy size={11} />}
   209 |                         {copied ? 'Copied' : 'Copy Analysis'}
   210 |                     </button>
   211 |                 </div>
   212 | 
   213 |                 {/* Attack Path Display */}
   214 |                 {pathNodes.length > 0 && (
   215 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
   216 |                         {pathNodes.map((node: string, i: number) => (
   217 |                             <React.Fragment key={i}>
   218 |                                 <span
   219 |                                     className="text-[11px] font-mono font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full shrink-0"
   220 |                                     style={{
   221 |                                         background: i === 0
   222 |                                             ? 'rgba(17,17,17,0.08)'
   223 |                                             : i === pathNodes.length - 1
   224 |                                                 ? 'rgba(220,38,38,0.08)'
   225 |                                                 : 'rgba(107,114,128,0.06)',
   226 |                                         color: i === pathNodes.length - 1 ? '#DC2626' : '#111',
   227 |                                     }}
   228 |                                 >
   229 |                                     {node}
   230 |                                 </span>
   231 |                                 {i < pathNodes.length - 1 && (
   232 |                                     <ChevronRight size={10} className="text-[#D1D5DB] shrink-0" />
   233 |                                 )}
   234 |                             </React.Fragment>
   235 |                         ))}
   236 |                     </div>
   237 |                 )}
   238 | 
   239 |                 {/* Risk Summary Row */}
   240 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   241 |                     {severity && (
   242 |                         <span
   243 |                             className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-1.5 py-[2px] rounded-full"
   244 |                             style={{
   245 |                                 color: severity === 'Critical' || severity === 'High' ? '#DC2626' : '#F59E0B',
   246 |                                 background: severity === 'Critical' || severity === 'High' ? 'rgba(220,38,38,0.06)' : 'rgba(245,158,11,0.06)',
   247 |                                 border: `1px solid ${severity === 'Critical' || severity === 'High' ? 'rgba(220,38,38,0.15)' : 'rgba(245,158,11,0.15)'}`,
   248 |                             }}
   249 |                         >
   250 |                             {severity} Risk
   251 |                         </span>
   252 |                     )}
   253 |                     {pathLength > 0 && (
   254 |                         <span className="text-[10px] text-[#6B7280] font-medium">{pathLength} Steps</span>
   255 |                     )}
   256 |                     {breachTime > 0 && (
   257 |                         <>
   258 |                             <span className="text-[10px] text-[#D1D5DB]">•</span>
   259 |                             <span className="text-[10px] text-[#6B7280] font-medium">Breach {breachTime}m</span>
   260 |                         </>
   261 |                     )}
   262 |                 </div>
   263 |             </div>
   264 | 
   265 |             {/* Divider */}
   266 |             <div className="h-px bg-black/[0.06] mx-5" />
   267 | 
   268 |             {/* AI Provider Toggle */}
   269 |             <div className="px-6 pt-3 pb-2 shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
   270 |                 <button
   271 |                     onClick={() => setAiSubTab('edge')}
   272 |                     className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold transition-all ${aiSubTab === 'edge' ? 'bg-black text-white shadow-sm' : 'text-[#6B7280] hover:bg-black/5'
   273 |                         }`}
   274 |                 >
   275 |                     Edge AI
   276 |                 </button>
   277 |                 <button
   278 |                     onClick={() => setAiSubTab('cloud')}
   279 |                     className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold transition-all ${aiSubTab === 'cloud' ? 'bg-black text-white shadow-sm' : 'text-[#6B7280] hover:bg-black/5'
   280 |                         }`}
   281 |                 >
   282 |                     Cloud AI
   283 |                 </button>
   284 |             </div>
   285 | 
   286 |             {/* Analysis Content */}
   287 |             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-6 pb-5 custom-scrollbar">
   288 |                 {activeData && !activeData.error ? (
   289 |                     <div className="pt-2">
   290 |                         {activeData.provider && (
   291 |                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
   292 |                                 <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-[#9CA3AF] uppercase tracking-wider bg-black/[0.03] px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
   293 |                                     {activeData.provider}
   294 |                                 </span>
   295 |                                 {activeData.model && (
   296 |                                     <span className="text-[10px] text-[#D1D5DB] font-mono">v{activeData.model}</span>
   297 |                                 )}
   298 |                             </div>
   299 |                         )}
   300 |                         <p className="text-[13px] text-[#374151] leading-[1.85] whitespace-pre-wrap">{activeData.insight}</p>
   301 |                     </div>
   302 |                 ) : (
   303 |                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10 text-center">
   304 |                         <AlertTriangle size={28} className="text-[#D1D5DB] mb-3" />
   305 |                         <h5 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-[#374151] mb-1">
   306 |                             {aiSubTab === 'edge' ? 'Edge AI' : 'Cloud AI'} Unavailable
   307 |                         </h5>
   308 |                         <p className="text-[12px] text-[#9CA3AF] max-w-[260px]">
   309 |                             {activeData?.error || (aiSubTab === 'edge'
   310 |                                 ? 'Edge AI not available. Run LM Studio locally.'
   311 |                                 : 'Cloud AI unavailable. Configure GEMINI_API_KEY.'
   312 |                             )}
   313 |                         </p>
   314 |                     </div>
   315 |                 )}
   316 |             </div>
   317 |         </div>
   318 |     );
   319 | };
   320 | 
   321 | /* ── Sub-components ──────────────────────────────── */
   322 | 
   323 | const InfoChip = ({ icon, label, value, accent }: {
   324 |     icon: React.ReactNode;
   325 |     label: string;
   326 |     value: string;
   327 |     accent?: string;
   328 | }) => (
   329 |     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   330 |         {icon}
   331 |         <span className="text-[11px] text-[#9CA3AF] font-medium">{label}</span>
   332 |         <span className="text-[12px] font-bold text-[#111] tabular-nums">{value}</span>
   333 |         {accent && (
   334 |             <span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-[#DC2626] uppercase ml-0.5">{accent}</span>
   335 |         )}
   336 |     </div>
   337 | );
   338 | 
   339 | const Divider = () => (
   340 |     <div className="w-px h-3 bg-black/[0.08]" />
   341 | );

FILE: frontend/src/modules/graphEngine/index.ts
LINES: 166

     1 | /**
     2 |  * graphEngine — Serializes the visual React Flow graph into the JSON schema
     3 |  * expected by the backend simulation API.
     4 |  */
     5 | 
     6 | import { Edge } from '@xyflow/react';
     7 | import { InfrastructureNode } from '../nodeState';
     8 | 
     9 | /**
    10 |  * Maps InfrastructureNodeType visual labels to backend server name strings.
    11 |  */
    12 | const typeToServerName = (label: string): string => {
    13 |     return label.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_').replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/g, '');
    14 | };
    15 | 
    16 | /**
    17 |  * Maps privilege level UI values to backend permission values.
    18 |  */
    19 | const privilegeToPermission = (level: string): 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' => {
    20 |     switch (level) {
    21 |         case 'High': return 'high';
    22 |         case 'Medium': return 'medium';
    23 |         default: return 'low';
    24 |     }
    25 | };
    26 | 
    27 | /**
    28 |  * Maps data criticality to a numeric asset value (1-10).
    29 |  */
    30 | const criticalityToAssetValue = (
    31 |     criticality: string,
    32 |     privilegeLevel: string,
    33 |     customValue?: number
    34 | ): number => {
    35 |     if (customValue !== undefined && customValue >= 1 && customValue <= 10) {
    36 |         return customValue;
    37 |     }
    38 |     const critBase = criticality === 'High' ? 8 : criticality === 'Medium' ? 5 : 2;
    39 |     const privBonus = privilegeLevel === 'High' ? 2 : privilegeLevel === 'Medium' ? 1 : 0;
    40 |     return Math.min(critBase + privBonus, 10);
    41 | };
    42 | 
    43 | /**
    44 |  * Parses port strings ("80", "443") into port numbers.
    45 |  */
    46 | const parsePorts = (ports?: string[]): number[] => {
    47 |     if (!ports) return [];
    48 |     return ports
    49 |         .map(p => parseInt(p.trim(), 10))
    50 |         .filter(p => !isNaN(p) && p > 0 && p <= 65535);
    51 | };
    52 | 
    53 | export interface SimulationInputJSON {
    54 |     servers: string[];
    55 |     connections: [string, string][];
    56 |     open_ports: Record<string, number[]>;
    57 |     permissions: Record<string, string>;
    58 |     asset_value: Record<string, number>;
    59 |     public_facing: string[];
    60 | }
    61 | 
    62 | /**
    63 |  * Converts the visual React Flow graph (nodes + edges) into the JSON schema
    64 |  * expected by the backend /api/simulate endpoint.
    65 |  *
    66 |  * Each node's `data.label` becomes the server name (lowercased, sanitized).
    67 |  * Edges become connections. Node properties map to ports, permissions, etc.
    68 |  */
    69 | export function exportGraphToSimulationJSON(
    70 |     nodes: InfrastructureNode[],
    71 |     edges: Edge[]
    72 | ): SimulationInputJSON {
    73 |     // Build a map from node ID → server name (sanitized label)
    74 |     const idToName: Record<string, string> = {};
    75 |     const nameCount: Record<string, number> = {};
    76 | 
    77 |     // First pass: assign unique names
    78 |     for (const node of nodes) {
    79 |         let baseName = typeToServerName(node.data.label);
    80 |         if (!baseName) baseName = 'node';
    81 | 
    82 |         if (nameCount[baseName] !== undefined) {
    83 |             nameCount[baseName]++;
    84 |             baseName = `${baseName}_${nameCount[baseName]}`;
    85 |         } else {
    86 |             nameCount[baseName] = 0;
    87 |         }
    88 | 
    89 |         idToName[node.id] = baseName;
    90 |     }
    91 | 
    92 |     const servers: string[] = [];
    93 |     const open_ports: Record<string, number[]> = {};
    94 |     const permissions: Record<string, string> = {};
    95 |     const asset_value: Record<string, number> = {};
    96 |     const public_facing: string[] = [];
    97 | 
    98 |     for (const node of nodes) {
    99 |         const name = idToName[node.id];
   100 |         const d = node.data;
   101 | 
   102 |         servers.push(name);
   103 |         open_ports[name] = parsePorts(d.ports);
   104 |         permissions[name] = privilegeToPermission(d.privilegeLevel);
   105 |         asset_value[name] = criticalityToAssetValue(
   106 |             d.dataCriticality,
   107 |             d.privilegeLevel,
   108 |             (d as any).assetValue
   109 |         );
   110 | 
   111 |         if (d.publicExposure) {
   112 |             public_facing.push(name);
   113 |         }
   114 |     }
   115 | 
   116 |     // Build connections from edges (source → target)
   117 |     const connections: [string, string][] = [];
   118 |     for (const edge of edges) {
   119 |         const src = idToName[edge.source];
   120 |         const tgt = idToName[edge.target];
   121 |         if (src && tgt) {
   122 |             connections.push([src, tgt]);
   123 |         }
   124 |     }
   125 | 
   126 |     return {
   127 |         servers,
   128 |         connections,
   129 |         open_ports,
   130 |         permissions,
   131 |         asset_value,
   132 |         public_facing,
   133 |     };
   134 | }
   135 | 
   136 | /**
   137 |  * Reverse maps a backend server name back to a node ID.
   138 |  */
   139 | export function buildNameToIdMap(
   140 |     nodes: InfrastructureNode[]
   141 | ): Record<string, string> {
   142 |     const idToName: Record<string, string> = {};
   143 |     const nameCount: Record<string, number> = {};
   144 | 
   145 |     for (const node of nodes) {
   146 |         let baseName = typeToServerName(node.data.label);
   147 |         if (!baseName) baseName = 'node';
   148 | 
   149 |         if (nameCount[baseName] !== undefined) {
   150 |             nameCount[baseName]++;
   151 |             baseName = `${baseName}_${nameCount[baseName]}`;
   152 |         } else {
   153 |             nameCount[baseName] = 0;
   154 |         }
   155 | 
   156 |         idToName[node.id] = baseName;
   157 |     }
   158 | 
   159 |     // Reverse: name → id
   160 |     const nameToId: Record<string, string> = {};
   161 |     for (const [id, name] of Object.entries(idToName)) {
   162 |         nameToId[name] = id;
   163 |     }
   164 |     return nameToId;
   165 | }
   166 |

   652 |   },

   746 |       { id: 'demo-e3', source: 'demo-db', target: 'demo-siem', type: 'network' },
   747 |       { id: 'demo-e4', source: 'demo-app', target: 'demo-ids', type: 'network' },
   748 |     ],
   749 |   },
   750 | };
   751 | 
   752 | export const DEMO_SCENARIO_NAMES = Object.keys(DEMO_SCENARIOS);
   753 | 
   754 | export const useNodeStateStore = create<NodeState>((set, get) => ({
   755 |   nodes: initialNodes,
   756 |   edges: initialEdges,
   757 |   selectedNodeId: null,
   758 | 
   759 |   pendingConnectionNodeId: null,
   760 | 
   761 |   originalNodes: null,
   762 |   originalEdges: null,
   763 |   originalRiskScore: null,
   764 | 
   765 |   isSimulating: false,
   766 |   simulationResults: null,
   767 |   backendResult: null,
   768 |   attackPath: [],
   769 |   timeline: [],
   770 |   simulationError: null,
   771 |   simulationDirty: false,
   772 | 
   773 |   attackPlaybackStep: -1,
   774 |   isPlaying: false,
   775 |   playbackTimerId: null,
   776 |   simulationJustFinished: false,
   777 |   hoveredTimelineNodeId: null,
   778 | 
   779 |   activeMitigations: [],
   780 |   recommendations: [],
   781 | 
   782 |   focusedAttackPath: null,
   783 |   focusModeEnabled: false,
   784 |   attackTimelineStep: null,
   785 | 
   786 |   viewMode: 'workspace',
   787 |   reportTab: 'metrics',
   788 | 
   789 |   heatmapEnabled: false,
   790 | 
   791 |   setNodes: (nodes) => set({ nodes }),
   792 |   setEdges: (edges) => set({ edges }),
   793 | 
   794 |   onNodesChange: (changes) => {
   795 |     set({
   796 |       nodes: applyNodeChanges(changes, get().nodes as any) as unknown as InfrastructureNode[],
   797 |     });
   798 |   },
   799 | 
   800 |   onEdgesChange: (changes) => {
   801 |     set({
   802 |       edges: applyEdgeChanges(changes, get().edges),
   803 |     });
   804 |   },
   805 | 
   806 |   onConnect: (connection) => {
   807 |     set({
   808 |       edges: addEdge({ ...connection, type: 'network' }, get().edges),
   809 |     });
   810 |   },
   811 | 
   812 |   addNode: (node) => {
   813 |     set({ nodes: [...get().nodes, node] });
   814 |   },
   815 | 
   816 |   setSelectedNodeId: (id) => set({ selectedNodeId: id }),
   817 | 
   818 |   setPendingConnection: (id) => set({ pendingConnectionNodeId: id }),
   819 | 
   820 |   setFocusedAttackPath: (path) => set({ focusedAttackPath: path, focusModeEnabled: true, attackTimelineStep: null }),
   821 |   toggleFocusMode: () => set((state) => {
   822 |     if (!state.focusModeEnabled && state.focusedAttackPath === null && state.backendResult?.paths?.length) {
   823 |       // Auto-select top path if enabling focus mode without one
   824 |       return { focusModeEnabled: true, focusedAttackPath: state.backendResult.paths[0] };
   825 |     }
   826 |     return { focusModeEnabled: !state.focusModeEnabled };
   827 |   }),
   828 |   clearFocusedPath: () => set({ focusedAttackPath: null, focusModeEnabled: false, attackTimelineStep: null }),
   829 |   animateAttackPath: (path) => {
   830 |     set({ focusedAttackPath: path, focusModeEnabled: true, attackTimelineStep: 0 });
   831 |     let step = 0;
   832 |     const interval = setInterval(() => {
   833 |       step++;
   834 |       if (step >= path.length) {
   835 |         clearInterval(interval);
   836 |       } else {
   837 |         useNodeStateStore.setState({ attackTimelineStep: step });
   838 |       }
   839 |     }, 600);
   840 |   },
   841 | 
   842 |   toggleHeatmap: () => set((state) => ({ heatmapEnabled: !state.heatmapEnabled })),
   843 | 
   844 |   startPlayback: () => {
   845 |     const { attackPath, isPlaying, playbackTimerId, attackPlaybackStep } = get();
   846 |     if (attackPath.length === 0 || isPlaying) return;
   847 | 
   848 |     // If already at the end, start from beginning
   849 |     const startStep = attackPlaybackStep >= attackPath.length - 1 ? 0 : attackPlaybackStep + 1;
   850 |     set({ attackPlaybackStep: startStep === 0 ? 0 : attackPlaybackStep, isPlaying: true });
   851 | 
   852 |     let step = startStep;
   853 |     if (startStep === 0) {
   854 |       set({ attackPlaybackStep: 0 });
   855 |       step = 1;
   856 |     }
   857 | 
   858 |     const timer = setInterval(() => {
   859 |       const { attackPath: currentPath } = get();
   860 |       if (step >= currentPath.length) {
   861 |         clearInterval(timer);
   862 |         useNodeStateStore.setState({ isPlaying: false, playbackTimerId: null });
   863 |         return;
   864 |       }
   865 |       useNodeStateStore.setState({ attackPlaybackStep: step });
   866 |       step++;
   867 |     }, 600);
   868 | 
   869 |     set({ playbackTimerId: timer });
   870 |   },
   871 | 
   872 |   pausePlayback: () => {
   873 |     const { playbackTimerId } = get();
   874 |     if (playbackTimerId) {
   875 |       clearInterval(playbackTimerId);
   876 |     }
   877 |     set({ isPlaying: false, playbackTimerId: null });
   878 |   },
   879 | 
   880 |   replayPlayback: () => {
   881 |     const { playbackTimerId } = get();
   882 |     if (playbackTimerId) {
   883 |       clearInterval(playbackTimerId);
   884 |     }
   885 |     set({ attackPlaybackStep: -1, isPlaying: false, playbackTimerId: null });
   886 |     // Start fresh after a small delay
   887 |     setTimeout(() => {
   888 |       get().startPlayback();
   889 |     }, 50);
   890 |   },
   891 | 
   892 |   clearSimulationJustFinished: () => set({ simulationJustFinished: false }),
   893 | 
   894 |   setWorkspaceView: () => set({ viewMode: 'workspace' }),
   895 |   setReportView: () => set({ viewMode: 'report' }),
   896 |   setReportTab: (tab) => set({ reportTab: tab }),
   897 | 
   898 |   addEdgeBetween: (sourceId, targetId) => {
   899 |     // Validate: no self-loop
   900 |     if (sourceId === targetId) return;
   901 |     // Validate: no duplicate edge
   902 |     const exists = get().edges.some(
   903 |       (e) => (e.source === sourceId && e.target === targetId) ||
   904 |         (e.source === targetId && e.target === sourceId)
   905 |     );
   906 |     if (exists) return;
   907 |     const newEdge: Edge = {
   908 |       id: `edge-${sourceId}-${targetId}-${Date.now()}`,
   909 |       source: sourceId,
   910 |       target: targetId,
   911 |       type: 'network',
   912 |     };
   913 |     set({ edges: [...get().edges, newEdge] });
   914 |   },
   915 | 
   916 |   updateNodeData: (id, data) => {
   917 |     set({
   918 |       nodes: get().nodes.map((node) => {
   919 |         if (node.id === id) {
   920 |           return {
   921 |             ...node,
   922 |             data: { ...node.data, ...data },
   923 |           };
   924 |         }
   925 |         return node;
   926 |       }),
   927 |     });
   928 |   },
   929 | 
   930 |   setHoveredTimelineNodeId: (id) => set({ hoveredTimelineNodeId: id }),
   931 | 
   932 |   runSimulation: async () => {
   933 |     if (get().isSimulating) return;
   934 | 
   935 |     const { nodes, edges } = get();
   936 | 
   937 |     if (nodes.length < 2) {
   938 |       set({ simulationError: 'Add at least 2 nodes to run a simulation.' });
   939 |       return;
   940 |     }
   941 | 
   942 |     if (edges.length === 0) {
   943 |       set({ simulationError: 'Add at least 1 connection between nodes to run a simulation.' });
   944 |       return;
   945 |     }
   946 | 
   947 |     const hasPublicFacing = nodes.some(n => n.data.publicExposure === true);
   948 |     if (!hasPublicFacing) {
   949 |       set({ simulationError: 'At least one node must be public-facing to simulate an attack entry point.' });
   950 |       return;
   951 |     }
   952 | 
   953 |     // Clear previous results and reset visual state
   954 |     set({
   955 |       isSimulating: true,
   956 |       attackPath: [],
   957 |       timeline: [],
   958 |       simulationResults: null,
   959 |       backendResult: null,
   960 |       simulationDirty: false,
   961 |       simulationError: null,
   962 |       nodes: nodes.map(n => ({ ...n, data: { ...n.data, highlighted: false, compromised: false } })),
   963 |       edges: edges.map(e => ({ ...e, animated: false, style: undefined })),
   964 |     });
   965 | 
   966 |     try {
   967 |       // Serialize graph to backend JSON format
   968 |       const architecture = exportGraphToSimulationJSON(get().nodes, get().edges);
   969 |       const nameToId = buildNameToIdMap(get().nodes);
   970 | 
   971 |       // Call backend API
   972 |       const res = await fetch('/api/simulate', {
   973 |         method: 'POST',
   974 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   975 |         body: JSON.stringify({
   976 |           architecture,
   977 |           attacker_skill: 1.0,
   978 |         }),
   979 |       });
   980 | 
   981 |       // Instead of ignoring HTTP status codes, check ok first
   982 |       if (!res.ok) {
   983 |         let errorMsg = `Server error: ${res.status}`;
   984 |         try {
   985 |           const errData = await res.json();
   986 |           if (errData.error) errorMsg = errData.error;
   987 |         } catch (_) { }
   988 |         set({ isSimulating: false, simulationError: errorMsg });
   989 |         return;
   990 |       }
   991 | 
   992 |       const data = await res.json();
   993 | 
   994 |       if (data.error) {
   995 |         set({ isSimulating: false, simulationError: data.error });
   996 |         return;
   997 |       }
   998 | 
   999 |       const result = data as SimulationResult;
  1000 | 
  1001 |       // Map backend attack path (server names) to node IDs
  1002 |       const attackPathIds = (result.primary_path || result.attack_path || [])
  1003 |         .map((name: string) => nameToId[name])
  1004 |         .filter(Boolean) as string[];
  1005 | 
  1006 |       // Build timeline from backend attack_steps
  1007 |       const timeline: TimelineStep[] = (result.attack_steps || []).map((step: any, i: number) => ({
  1008 |         id: String(i + 1),
  1009 |         type: i === 0 ? 'Initial Access' as const
  1010 |           : step.step_type === 'Privilege Escalation' ? 'Privilege Escalation' as const
  1011 |             : i === (result.attack_steps || []).length - 1 ? 'Target Compromise' as const
  1012 |               : 'Lateral Movement' as const,
  1013 |         nodeLabel: step.node || `Step ${i + 1}`,
  1014 |         nodeId: step.node ? nameToId[step.node] : undefined,
  1015 |         timestamp: result.breach_time_data?.breakdown?.[i]
  1016 |           ? `${result.breach_time_data.breakdown[i].adjusted_minutes}m`
  1017 |           : `${(i + 1) * 15}m`,
  1018 |         details: step.vulns?.length > 0
  1019 |           ? `Exploited ${step.vulns.join(', ')} via ${step.step_type}`
  1020 |           : `${step.step_type} on ${step.node} (${step.permission} privilege)`,
  1021 |       }));
  1022 | 
  1023 |       // Tracking timeouts to clear them if simulation resets
  1024 |       const animationTimeouts: NodeJS.Timeout[] = [];
  1025 | 
  1026 |       // Animate attack path overlay
  1027 |       let currentPath: string[] = [];
  1028 |       attackPathIds.forEach((nodeId, index) => {
  1029 |         const t = setTimeout(() => {
  1030 |           currentPath = [...currentPath, nodeId];
  1031 | 
  1032 |           set({
  1033 |             attackPath: currentPath,
  1034 |             nodes: get().nodes.map(node => {
  1035 |               const inPath = currentPath.includes(node.id);
  1036 |               const stepIndex = currentPath.indexOf(node.id);
  1037 |               return {
  1038 |                 ...node,
  1039 |                 data: {
  1040 |                   ...node.data,
  1041 |                   highlighted: inPath,
  1042 |                   compromised: inPath,
  1043 |                   isEntry: inPath && node.id === attackPathIds[0],
  1044 |                   isTarget: inPath && node.id === attackPathIds[attackPathIds.length - 1],
  1045 |                   attackStep: inPath ? stepIndex + 1 : undefined,
  1046 |                 }
  1047 |               };
  1048 |             }),
  1049 |             edges: get().edges.map(edge => ({
  1050 |               ...edge,
  1051 |               animated: currentPath.includes(edge.source) && currentPath.includes(edge.target),
  1052 |               style: currentPath.includes(edge.source) && currentPath.includes(edge.target)
  1053 |                 ? { stroke: '#ef4444', strokeWidth: 3, filter: 'drop-shadow(0 0 8px #ef4444)' }
  1054 |                 : undefined
  1055 |             }))
  1056 |           });
  1057 | 
  1058 |           // After last node: set final results
  1059 |           if (index === attackPathIds.length - 1) {
  1060 |             const simulationResults: SimulationResults = {
  1061 |               riskScore: Math.round((result.risk_score || 0) * 10),
  1062 |               attackPaths: result.paths?.length || 1,
  1063 |               estimatedBreachTime: result.breach_time || 'N/A',
  1064 |               confidenceScore: result.confidence_score || 0,
  1065 |               severity: result.severity,
  1066 |               exploitProbability: result.exploit_probability,
  1067 |               monteCarloRate: result.monte_carlo_results?.breach_success_rate,
  1068 |             };
  1069 | 
  1070 |             const allPaths = getInfrastructureAttackPaths(get().nodes, get().edges);
  1071 |             const recs = generateRecommendations(get().nodes, get().edges, allPaths.length > 0 ? allPaths : [attackPathIds]);
  1072 | 
  1073 |             set({
  1074 |               isSimulating: false,
  1075 |               timeline,
  1076 |               simulationResults,
  1077 |               backendResult: result,
  1078 |               recommendations: recs,
  1079 |               simulationJustFinished: true,
  1080 |             });
  1081 | 
  1082 |             const rt = setTimeout(() => {
  1083 |               if (get().viewMode !== 'report') {
  1084 |                 set({ viewMode: 'report', reportTab: 'metrics' });
  1085 |               }
  1086 |             }, 5000);
  1087 |             get()._animationTimeouts?.push(rt);
  1088 |           }
  1089 |         }, (index + 1) * 600);
  1090 |         animationTimeouts.push(t);
  1091 |       });
  1092 | 
  1093 |       // Save to store so resetSimulation can access them
  1094 |       set({ _animationTimeouts: animationTimeouts });
  1095 | 
  1096 |       // If no attack path found, still set results
  1097 |       if (attackPathIds.length === 0) {
  1098 |         set({
  1099 |           isSimulating: false,
  1100 |           simulationResults: {
  1101 |             riskScore: Math.round((result.risk_score || 0) * 10),
  1102 |             attackPaths: 0,
  1103 |             estimatedBreachTime: result.breach_time || 'N/A',
  1104 |             confidenceScore: result.confidence_score || 0,
  1105 |             severity: result.severity,
  1106 |           },
  1107 |           backendResult: result,
  1108 |         });
  1109 | 
  1110 |         const defaultPathTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
  1111 |           if (get().viewMode !== 'report') {
  1112 |             set({ viewMode: 'report', reportTab: 'metrics' });
  1113 |           }
  1114 |         }, 5000);
  1115 |         set({ _animationTimeouts: [defaultPathTimeout] });
  1116 |       }
  1117 | 
  1118 |     } catch (err: any) {
  1119 |       set({
  1120 |         isSimulating: false,
  1121 |         simulationError: err.message || 'Simulation failed. Check if the backend is running.',
  1122 |       });
  1123 |     }
  1124 |   },
  1125 | 
  1126 |   resetSimulation: () => {
  1127 |     const { playbackTimerId, _animationTimeouts } = get();
  1128 |     if (playbackTimerId) clearInterval(playbackTimerId);
  1129 |     if (_animationTimeouts) {
  1130 |       _animationTimeouts.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
  1131 |     }
  1132 |     set({
  1133 |       isSimulating: false,
  1134 |       simulationResults: null,
  1135 |       backendResult: null,
  1136 |       attackPath: [],
  1137 |       timeline: [],
  1138 |       simulationError: null,
  1139 |       attackPlaybackStep: -1,
  1140 |       isPlaying: false,
  1141 |       playbackTimerId: null,
  1142 |       simulationJustFinished: false,
  1143 |       nodes: get().nodes.map(node => ({
  1144 |         ...node,
  1145 |         data: {
  1146 |           ...node.data,
  1147 |           highlighted: false,
  1148 |           compromised: false,
  1149 |           isEntry: false,
  1150 |           isTarget: false,
  1151 |           attackStep: undefined,
  1152 |         }
  1153 |       })),
  1154 |       edges: get().edges.map(edge => ({
  1155 |         ...edge,
  1156 |         animated: false,
  1157 |         style: undefined
  1158 |       })),
  1159 |       activeMitigations: [],
  1160 |       recommendations: [],
  1161 |       originalNodes: null,
  1162 |       originalEdges: null,
  1163 |       originalRiskScore: null,
  1164 |     });
  1165 |   },
  1166 | 
  1167 |   generateExample: () => {
  1168 |     set({ nodes: initialNodes, edges: initialEdges });
  1169 |     get().resetSimulation();
  1170 |   },
  1171 | 
  1172 |   autoArrange: () => {
  1173 |     const { nodes, edges } = get();
  1174 |     if (nodes.length === 0) return;
  1175 |     const g = new Dagre.graphlib.Graph().setDefaultEdgeLabel(() => ({}));
  1176 |     g.setGraph({ rankdir: 'TB', nodesep: 80, ranksep: 120 });
  1177 |     nodes.forEach((node) => g.setNode(node.id, { width: 220, height: 120 }));
  1178 |     edges.forEach((edge) => g.setEdge(edge.source, edge.target));
  1179 |     Dagre.layout(g);
  1180 |     set({
  1181 |       nodes: nodes.map((node) => {
  1182 |         const pos = g.node(node.id);
  1183 |         return { ...node, position: { x: pos.x - 110, y: pos.y - 60 } };
  1184 |       }),
  1185 |     });
  1186 |   },
  1187 | 
  1188 |   loadDemoArchitecture: () => {
  1189 |     set({ nodes: initialNodes, edges: initialEdges });
  1190 |     get().resetSimulation();
  1191 |     get().autoArrange();
  1192 |   },
  1193 | 
  1194 |   loadDemoScenario: (name: string) => {
  1195 |     const scenario = DEMO_SCENARIOS[name];
  1196 |     if (!scenario) {
  1197 |       console.warn(`[loadDemoScenario] Unknown scenario: "${name}". Available: ${DEMO_SCENARIO_NAMES.join(', ')}`);
  1198 |       return;
  1199 |     }
  1200 | 
  1201 |     // Deep-clone to avoid mutating the definitions
  1202 |     const scenarioNodes = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(scenario.nodes)) as InfrastructureNode[];
  1203 |     const scenarioEdges = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(scenario.edges)) as Edge[];
  1204 | 
  1205 |     // Reset graph and simulation state, then load scenario
  1206 |     set({
  1207 |       nodes: scenarioNodes,
  1208 |       edges: scenarioEdges,
  1209 |       selectedNodeId: null,
  1210 |     });
  1211 |     get().resetSimulation();
  1212 |     get().autoArrange();
  1213 |   },
  1214 | 
  1215 |   resetCanvas: () => {
  1216 |     set({ nodes: [], edges: [], selectedNodeId: null });
  1217 |     get().resetSimulation();
  1218 |   },
  1219 | 
  1220 |   applyMitigation: (recommendation) => {
  1221 |     if (!get().simulationResults) return;
  1222 | 
  1223 |     // Backup current state if not already active
  1224 |     if (get().activeMitigations.length === 0) {
  1225 |       set({
  1226 |         originalNodes: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(get().nodes)),
  1227 |         originalEdges: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(get().edges)),
  1228 |         originalRiskScore: get().simulationResults?.riskScore || 0,
  1229 |       });
  1230 |     }
  1231 | 
  1232 |     // Check if already applied
  1233 |     if (get().activeMitigations.some(m => m.id === recommendation.id)) return;
  1234 | 
  1235 |     const newMitigations = [...get().activeMitigations, recommendation];
  1236 | 
  1237 |     const result = simulateMitigation(
  1238 |       get().originalNodes || get().nodes,
  1239 |       get().originalEdges || get().edges,
  1240 |       newMitigations,
  1241 |       get().originalRiskScore || get().simulationResults?.riskScore || 0
  1242 |     );
  1243 | 
  1244 |     set({
  1245 |       nodes: result.newNodes,
  1246 |       edges: result.newEdges,
  1247 |       activeMitigations: newMitigations,
  1248 |       simulationResults: null,
  1249 |       backendResult: null,
  1250 |       attackPath: [],
  1251 |       simulationDirty: true,
  1252 |     });
  1253 |   },
  1254 | 
  1255 |   removeMitigation: (recommendation) => {
  1256 |     if (get().activeMitigations.length === 0 || !get().originalNodes || !get().originalEdges) return;
  1257 | 
  1258 |     const newMitigations = get().activeMitigations.filter(m => m.id !== recommendation.id);
  1259 | 
  1260 |     if (newMitigations.length === 0) {
  1261 |       get().clearMitigations();
  1262 |       return;
  1263 |     }
  1264 | 
  1265 |     const result = simulateMitigation(
  1266 |       get().originalNodes!,
  1267 |       get().originalEdges!,
  1268 |       newMitigations,
  1269 |       get().originalRiskScore || get().simulationResults?.riskScore || 0
  1270 |     );
  1271 | 
  1272 |     set({
  1273 |       nodes: result.newNodes,
  1274 |       edges: result.newEdges,
  1275 |       activeMitigations: newMitigations,
  1276 |       simulationResults: null,
  1277 |       backendResult: null,
  1278 |       attackPath: [],
  1279 |       simulationDirty: true,
  1280 |     });
  1281 |   },
  1282 | 
  1283 |   clearMitigations: () => {
  1284 |     if (get().activeMitigations.length === 0 || !get().originalNodes || !get().originalEdges) return;
  1285 | 
  1286 |     set({
  1287 |       nodes: get().originalNodes!,
  1288 |       edges: get().originalEdges!,
  1289 |       activeMitigations: [],
  1290 |       simulationResults: null,
  1291 |       backendResult: null,
  1292 |       attackPath: [],
  1293 |       originalNodes: null,
  1294 |       originalEdges: null,
  1295 |       originalRiskScore: null,
  1296 |       simulationDirty: true,
  1297 |     });
  1298 |   }
  1299 | }));
  1300 | 
  1301 | export const useNodeStore = useNodeStateStore;
  1302 |

FILE: frontend/src/modules/workspaceState/index.ts

     1 | import { create } from 'zustand';
     2 | import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';
     3 | 
     4 | export interface WorkspaceTab {
     5 |   id: string;
     6 |   title: string;
     7 |   active: boolean;
     8 |   type: 'simulator' | 'dashboard' | 'reports';
     9 | }
    10 | 
    11 | interface WorkspaceState {
    12 |   tabs: WorkspaceTab[];
    13 |   activeTabId: string | null;
    14 |   addTab: (tab: Omit<WorkspaceTab, 'active'>) => void;
    15 |   removeTab: (id: string) => void;
    16 |   setActiveTab: (id: string) => void;
    17 |   isSidebarCollapsed: boolean;
    18 |   toggleSidebar: () => void;
    19 | }
    20 | 
    21 | export const useWorkspaceStore = create<WorkspaceState>()(
    22 |   persist(
    23 |     (set) => ({
    24 |       tabs: [
    25 |         { id: '1', title: 'Main Simulation', active: true, type: 'simulator' },
    26 |         { id: '2', title: 'Network Analysis', active: false, type: 'simulator' },
    27 |       ],
    28 |       activeTabId: '1',
    29 |       addTab: (tab) =>
    30 |         set((state) => {
    31 |           const newTab = { ...tab, active: true };
    32 |           return {
    33 |             tabs: [...state.tabs.map((t) => ({ ...t, active: false })), newTab],
    34 |             activeTabId: tab.id,
    35 |           };
    36 |         }),
    37 |       removeTab: (id) =>
    38 |         set((state) => {
    39 |           const newTabs = state.tabs.filter((t) => t.id !== id);
    40 |           let newActiveTabId = state.activeTabId;
    41 |           if (state.activeTabId === id) {
    42 |             newActiveTabId = newTabs.length > 0 ? newTabs[0].id : null;
    43 |             if (newActiveTabId) {
    44 |               newTabs[0].active = true;
    45 |             }
    46 |           }
    47 |           return { tabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newActiveTabId };
    48 |         }),
    49 |       setActiveTab: (id) =>
    50 |         set((state) => ({
    51 |           tabs: state.tabs.map((t) => ({ ...t, active: t.id === id })),
    52 |           activeTabId: id,
    53 |         })),
    54 |       isSidebarCollapsed: false,
    55 |       toggleSidebar: () => set((state) => ({ isSidebarCollapsed: !state.isSidebarCollapsed })),
    56 |     }),
    57 |     {
    58 |       name: 'attack-simulator-workspace-v1',
    59 |     }
    60 |   )
    61 | );

     1 | 
     2 | import { Edge } from '@xyflow/react';
     3 | import { InfrastructureNode, SimulationResults } from '../nodeState';
     4 | import { calculateChokePoints, NodeCentrality } from './chokePointAnalysis';
     5 | import { generateRecommendations, Recommendation } from './recommendationEngine';
     6 | import { simulateMitigation, MitigationResult } from './mitigationSimulator';
     7 | 
     8 | export interface DefenderAnalysisResults {
     9 |   recommendations: Recommendation[];
    10 |   chokePoints: NodeCentrality[];
    11 | }
    12 | 
    13 | export const runDefenderAnalysis = (
    14 |   nodes: InfrastructureNode[],
    15 |   edges: Edge[],
    16 |   simulationResults: SimulationResults | null,
    17 |   attackPaths: string[][]
    18 | ): DefenderAnalysisResults => {
    19 |   if (!simulationResults || attackPaths.length === 0) {
    20 |     return { recommendations: [], chokePoints: [] };
    21 |   }
    22 | 
    23 |   const chokePoints = calculateChokePoints(nodes, attackPaths);
    24 |   const recommendations = generateRecommendations(nodes, edges, attackPaths);
    25 | 
    26 |   return {
    27 |     recommendations,
    28 |     chokePoints
    29 |   };
    30 | };
    31 |
